clusters.title: Untrusted host is executed through the shell

member_findings.title: Untrusted host is executed through the shell
member_findings.impact: Any caller-controlled host value can append shell metacharacters and run arbitrary commands on the machine executing dscli, because the value is interpolated into a command string passed to subprocess.run with shell=True.
member_findings.fix: Invoke ping with an argument list and shell=False, for example subprocess.run(["ping", "-c", str(count), host], ...), and validate host/count before invoking the binary.
